description.value: A spell scroll contains the magical essence of a specific spell inscribed on parchment or vellum. When you read the scroll, you cast the spell contained within, expending no spell slots and requiring no material components. The spell uses the scroll's spell save DC and spell attack bonus, which are based on the caster's proficiency and spellcasting ability. Once the spell is cast, the scroll crumbles to dust and is destroyed. If the spell is not on your class's spell list, you must succeed on an Intelligence (Arcana) check to cast it, with the DC equal to 10 + the spell's level. On a failure, the spell is not cast, and the scroll is not consumed.

activation.condition: Spell must be on the caster's spell list.

magic-items-2.destroyFlavorText: reaches 0 charges: it crumbles into ashes and is destroyed.

description.value:
A spell scroll contains the magical essence of a specific spell inscribed on parchment or vellum. When you read the scroll, you cast the spell contained within, expending no spell slots and requiring no material components. The spell uses the scroll's spell save DC and spell attack bonus, which are based on the caster's proficiency and spellcasting ability. Once the spell is cast, the scroll crumbles to dust and is destroyed. If the spell is not on your class's spell list, you must succeed on an Intelligence (Arcana) check to cast it, with the DC equal to 10 + the spell's level. On a failure, the spell is not cast, and the scroll is not consumed.

Up to three creatures of your choice that you can see within range must make Charisma saving throws. Whenever a target that fails this saving throw makes an attack roll or a saving throw before the spell ends, the target must roll a d4 and subtract the number rolled from the attack roll or saving throw.

activation.condition: Spell must be on the caster's spell list.

A spell scroll contains the magical essence of a specific spell inscribed on parchment or vellum.

When you read the scroll, you cast the spell contained within, expending no spell slots and requiring no material components.

The spell uses the scroll's spell save DC and spell attack bonus, which are based on the caster's proficiency and spellcasting ability.

Once the spell is cast, the scroll crumbles to dust and is destroyed. If the spell is not on your class's spell list, you must succeed on an Intelligence (Arcana) check to cast it, with the DC equal to 10 + the spell's level.

On a failure, the spell is not cast, and the scroll is not consumed.

activation.condition: Spell must be on the caster's spell list.

magic-items-2.destroyFlavorText: reaches 0 charges: it crumbles into ashes and is destroyed.
